name: guidance-calm-session
note: S-GUIDANCE-CALM (operator interview 2026-07-19, from UAT 'after dismiss then return, another diff shows on some - not smooth'): at most ONE journey tip per app session. A beginner sees the firstrun cue on Library; dismissing it must NOT let the tunefirst cue claim when they visit Tune in the same session (pre-fix it did - the whack-a-mole). The next session (fresh sessionStorage) may surface the next tip - covered by the session-gate unit tests in test/notables.test.js. Written red-first against the pre-fix tree.

steps.label: exactly one quiet tip is up (the beginner firstrun cue on Library)
NO successor tip on Tune - dismissing never reveals another until the next session
returning to Library reveals nothing either - the session stays settled
